definitions.name: Product handle
definitions.description: Recipes blog only. Shopify product handle used in this recipe (e.g. marinade-mild).

definitions.name: Prep time
definitions.description: Recipes blog only. Preparation time (e.g. 15 mins).

definitions.name: Cook time
definitions.description: Recipes blog only. Cooking time (e.g. 30 mins).

definitions.name: Servings
definitions.description: Recipes blog only. Number of servings (e.g. 4).

definitions.name: Difficulty
definitions.description: Recipes blog only. Easy, Medium, or Hard.

definitions.name: Ingredients
definitions.description: Recipes blog only. One ingredient per line.

definitions.name: Event date
definitions.description: Events blog only. When the event takes place (e.g. 14 July 2026, 11am–4pm).

definitions.name: Event location
definitions.description: Events blog only. Venue or city (e.g. Borough Market, London).
